summary: The diff implements all four requirements: REQ-11 (black/red theme via tailwind.config.js and index.css), REQ-12 (INR pricing ₹599/₹1499/₹299 in Services.tsx), REQ-13 (phone +91 8527230903 as tel: link, no address in Contact.tsx), and REQ-14 (Monday–Sunday 8:00 AM–4:00 PM working hours in Contact.tsx). The About.tsx still uses garage-gold class names but these now resolve to red via token remapping. One hallucinated feature was identified: a Doorstep Detailing service tier added beyond the three requested tiers.

hallucinated_features.description: A 'Doorstep Detailing — Get a Quote' option was added to the service selection dropdown in Contact.tsx and referenced in the Footer.tsx services list, representing a fourth service tier beyond the three requested.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists 'Adding new service tiers beyond what is requested' as a non-goal. Only Basic Exterior Wash, Interior + Exterior, and Bike Wash were requested.
